overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial district in Night City. The player character moves from beneath a concrete overpass, through intersections with passing vehicles, past steaming industrial buildings, through construction barriers, and under metal pipe bridges while approaching the downtown skyline.

events.description: black sedan drives through the intersection from left to right
turning right at the intersection onto the industrial road

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the overpass and turning right at the intersection, passing the traffic light

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating shadow overhead with visible support beams
vertical traffic signal showing red light mounted on black pole
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple crossbar levels and power lines
red brick industrial building with large white smokestack emitting steam

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete highway overpass in an industrial district. The camera moves forward and turns right at an intersection where a black sedan passes by. A red brick industrial building with a smokestack stands on the left, while a tall transmission tower rises in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with steam vents and construction barriers

events.description: passing large white steam plume rising from industrial building on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past industrial buildings with visible steam emissions

notable_agents.action: silver SUV parked along the curb near the industrial building

entered.detail: large white steam emission rising vertically from industrial facility
red and white striped construction barriers blocking the road ahead
tall modern street lamp with curved design

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit industrial sidewalk, the camera passes a silver SUV parked near a red brick building emitting large plumes of white steam. Construction barriers block the road ahead, and the transmission tower shifts to the left as the camera advances toward the barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed passage under overpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: passing through metal construction barriers into enclosed underpass area
entering deep shadow beneath the concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the construction barriers and entering the shadowed passage beneath the overpass

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
second concrete overpass creating a dark tunnel-like passage
tall futuristic skyscrapers with neon signs visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: Passing through the red and white construction barriers, the scene transitions into a narrow, shadowed passage beneath a concrete overpass. The walls are covered in graffiti, and the futuristic city skyline becomes visible in the distance ahead as the lighting dims significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with overhead pipe bridges

events.description: emerging from shadow back into direct sunlight
passing underneath metal pipe bridge walkway overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial corridor passing under metal walkways and pipe bridges while moving toward the open area

entered.detail: rusted metal walkway bridge with green painted sections crossing overhead
large cylindrical green storage tank with yellow safety railings
building facade with large metal louvered ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadowed underpass into mixed lighting, the camera walks beneath a series of rusted metal pipe bridges. A large green industrial tank with yellow railings stands on the right, while ventilation grates cover the building wall on the left. The distant skyline shifts to the left as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with power transmission infrastructure

events.description: entering open industrial yard with clear view of large transmission towers

agents.ego_description: walking toward an open intersection dominated by large power transmission towers and distant highway ramps

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with support columns crossing the industrial yard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide industrial yard with the transmission tower now prominent on the right side. An elevated highway overpass spans the area ahead, and the futuristic city skyline is clearly visible in the center distance. The camera continues walking toward the open intersection as the industrial corridor gives way to the expansive yard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gritty industrial district that gradually opens up to reveal a futuristic city skyline. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, moving through an intersection past a black sedan and a red brick building with a towering transmission tower in the distance. As the camera advances along a sunlit sidewalk, it passes a silver SUV and plumes of white steam before navigating through red and white construction barriers. The scene then shifts into a narrow, shadowed passage covered in graffiti, where the lighting dims significantly before the camera emerges beneath rusted metal pipe bridges and a large green industrial tank. Finally, the path opens into a wide industrial yard, leaving the narrow corridor behind as the camera walks toward an elevated highway with the expansive city skyline centered in the distance.
